title: Ailaka Height Increase Insoles for Men Women - 1 Pair PU Shoe Lifts Inserts Elastic Shock Absorbing Sports Thick Shoe Insoles Height Increase, Elevator Inserts for Men Women
features: SUPER SHOCK ABSORPTION: The PU shoe soles men height with GEL pad under heel and forefoot are designed specifically to fully absorb shock and reduce stress on feet with every step. It is suitable for high-intensity exercise and helping reducing exercise-induced fatigue, like shin splints, runner's knee, plantar fasciitis.

INVISIBLE THREE HEIGHTS: Nobody would know the secret of your increased height. Three optional heights are perfect for different occasions like meeting, appointment, wedding, shopping or any events where there is a camera lurking about. Tailorable size is easy to fit your feet and any types of footwear.
ALL DAY COMFORT: Non slip texture under the sole prevents insoles slipping inside your shoes. Three dimensional support designs help maintain stability to make your feet more comfortable.

SPORTS, WORK & LEISURE: The shoe lift inserts are perfect for improving performance and reducing fatigue in daily life. Good cushioning effect can reduce impact on the joints and muscles, relieving pains caused by leg length discrepancies.

CUSTOMER ARE OUR PRIORITY: We offer 100% no risk money back guarantee if you’re not thrilled with your purchase for any reason. Our replacement insoles are suitable for boots, dress shoes, sports shoes, sneakers, high-top shoes, tennis shoes. (You will receive one pair of insoles of the height you choose.)
